War Dispatches

All News & Updates

The Shattered Realm never stops changing. Neither do we. Patch notes, events, expansions, and developer dispatches — all in one place.

Featured
Event  ·  Mar 18, 2026

Alpha Stress Test Dates Announced

Prepare your weapons. The first official stress test dates have been locked in. Find out how to secure your invite.

Read the full article →
Mar 25, 2026Update
Class Reveal: The Dreadknight
Meet the relentless frontline powerhouse of the Shattered Realm in our latest class feature. Blood, rage, and survival.
Full dispatch coming soon
Mar 05, 2026Dev Note
Designing the Ashwalker — Developer Commentary
Lead designer Kael Vorn discusses the design philosophy behind the Ashwalker class, from early prototypes to the final kit that shipped in Chapter II.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 28, 2026Update
Environment Concept: The Voidrift
First look at the corrupted landscapes of the upcoming Voidrift region in concept art. Learn how the art team built the Shattered Realm's darkest zone.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 14, 2026Feature
Guild Foundation Preview
How alliances, territory control, and guild warfare will function when the servers eventually go live. You cannot conquer the realm alone.
Full dispatch coming soon
Feb 03, 2026Patch
Tech Update: DirectX 12 Migration
A deep dive into our engine migration progress and the performance targets we are setting for the upcoming Alpha tests.
Full dispatch coming soon
Jan 22, 2026Dev Note
Roadmap: Alpha Testing Phases
A look at what Ironveil Studios has planned for the next six months of development: closed alpha, combat tuning, and the path to beta.
Full dispatch coming soon

Current Build

Pre-Alpha
v0.8.4
  • Network backend stability improved
  • New launcher auth flow integrated
  • Combat animations polished
  • Stress test metrics implemented
